2141850.name: Riddledale
2141850.description:
The world of Riddledale is filled with fantastic creatures and wizards. Follow Wilburn on his homecoming journey after years abroad. Meet Ralph, your new companion, and embark on a quest to solve the riddle of the crystals. As he explores the island, Wilburn will soon discover that the place where he grew up changed during the years, and that a dangerous secret now lies under the island.

Riddledale is a new open-world adventure centered around story and characters. Solve riddles, make fun encounters and fight ferocious creatures on a vast island full of secrets.



Riddledale is filled with creatures and foes. You will need to be swift to defeat your enemies, but above all, you must be prepared. Rest well, plan your expeditions, and gather food and supplies before venturing forth. Combine your combat skills with Ralph's powerful spells to overcome your foes.



Collecting resources is essential—it allows you to brew potent potions, cook delicious meals, and craft powerful tools and weapons. Hone your crafting and gathering skills to unlock hidden quests and uncover unexplored locations.



Riddledale is centered around storytelling. The world and characters evolve as the story progresses, as do your relationships with your friends. Dialogues and quests will guide you on your journey, but exploring the island freely will always lead to new, fun, and unusual encounters.

Riddledale is a volcanic island in the middle of the sea, located between the western and the eastern continents. Ancient ruins from an extinct civilization still cover the island but its fall remains unsolved. In more recent years, the town of Riddledale has grown to become a prime touristic destination and its new mining operations are rapidly putting back the forgotten island on the maps.

Visit the official website to learn more about the game. Join the community and get a chance to participate in exclusive beta tests before release.
2141850.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
